commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainers should choose the canonical branch and accept the compatibility/session retry semantics; there is no narrow automated repair finding in the current diff.; Cleared: The diff changes TypeScript agent retry/replay logic and focused tests only; no concrete security or supply-chain regression was found. (sha=7533e1535906267b1ac776f95330526a0662d182)
commands.review_summary:
Adds current-attempt replay metadata to embedded agent attempt results, uses it for silent provider-error retry eligibility, includes `server_error` in the retry gate, and expands focused retry tests.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +211. Total +246 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main passes accumulated replay state into attempts and rejects silent-error retry when cumulative replay metadata reports side effects, matching the linked prior-tool plus transient provider-error report.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers should choose the canonical branch and accept the compatibility/session retry semantics; there is no narrow automated repair finding in the current diff.

target.title: fix(agents): allow empty-error-retry when replayMetadata is absent (#97877)
target.body:
Fixes #97877.

## What Problem This Solves

`replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects` is accumulated across attempts via `observeReplayMetadata`. When a session executes tools on Turn 1 and then hits a transient provider 5xx on Turn 2 (before any tool execution in the current attempt), the cumulative flag is already `true` from Turn 1 ŌĆö incorrectly blocking the empty-error-retry path even though the failed model call itself never ran tools.

Additionally, classified `server_error` (the failover reason produced by real provider 5xx responses) was excluded from `silentErrorRetryReason`, so the central reported failure path never reached the retry gate.

## Why This Change Was Made

Six changes across three layers:

**Layer 1 ŌĆö Per-attempt side-effect separation:**

1. **EmbeddedRunAttemptResult** (types.ts): Added optional `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` ŌĆö records side effects from the current attempt only, excluding prior accumulated session history.

2. **replay-state.ts**: Added `currentAttemptReplayState(initial, current)` ŌĆö computes the per-attempt delta from monotonically accumulated replay state (flags only go `falseŌåÆtrue`, so delta = `!initial.X && current.X`).

3. **attempt.ts**: Saves `initialReplayStateSnapshot` immediately after subscription extraction, before any tool work. At result assembly, computes `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` as the merge of the replay state delta (captures tool side-effect updates from `handleToolExecutionEnd`) and `observedReplayMetadata` (captures messaging/cron/spawn side effects). Emitted on the result for normalization.

4. **normalizeEmbeddedRunAttemptResult** (run.ts): Passes through `raw.currentAttemptReplayMetadata` without computing it. Falls back to `undefined` for legacy harnesses. The cumulative `replayMetadata` stays required via `resolveAttemptReplayMetadata(raw)`.

5. **shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn** (incomplete-turn.ts): Prefers `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` when available, falling back to cumulative `replayMetadata` for legacy harnesses (`currentAttemptReplayMetadata ?? replayMetadata`).

**Layer 2 ŌĆö Classified error routing:**

6. **silentErrorRetryReason** (run.ts): Added `assistantFailoverReason === "server_error"`. Real provider 5xx responses produce `server_error` via the failover classifier ŌĆö now routed through the retry gate.

## User Impact

Agents recover from transient provider 5xx errors on any turn ŌĆö even after prior turns executed tools. The retry is blocked only when the **same** attempt had side effects (tools, messaging, cron, spawns), preventing duplicate execution.

**Decision matrix:**
| currentAttemptReplayMetadata | replayMetadata (cumulative) | Retry | Scenario |
|------------------------------|-----------------------------|-------|----------|
| clean | dirty (prior tools) | Ō£ģ YES | #97877 fix |
| dirty (same-attempt tool) | clean | ŌØī NO | Prevents duplicate side effects |
| dirty (same-attempt tool) | dirty | ŌØī NO | Both agree |
| undefined (legacy harness) | dirty | ŌØī NO | Conservative fallback |
| undefined (legacy harness) | clean | Ō£ģ YES | Legacy harness OK |

## Evidence

**Behavior addressed**: Cumulative `replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects` blocked retry of transient 5xx on later turns. Classified `server_error` was excluded from the retry gate. Same-attempt unsafe tool updates were invisible to the per-attempt metadata signal.

**Real environment tested**: Node 22.19+, local OpenClaw checkout. Three proof levels.

**Proof 1 ŌĆö Runner-level: `[empty-error-retry]` log capture**

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts --run
 Test Files  1 passed (1) / Tests  25 passed (25)
```

Key assertions from the real `runEmbeddedAgent` path (only `runEmbeddedAttempt` mocked):
```
Ō£ō 5xx empty ŌåÆ "[empty-error-retry]" log fires (retry)
Ō£ō prior-turn tools + per-attempt clean ŌåÆ log fires (#97877 fix)
Ō£ō server_error + empty ŌåÆ log fires (classified 5xx retry)
Ō£ō same-attempt tools + per-attempt dirty ŌåÆ log ABSENT (no duplicate side effects)
Ō£ō legacy harness: dirty cumulative + absent per-attempt ŌåÆ log ABSENT (conservative)
```

**Proof 2 ŌĆö Gateway-level: Live agent recovery with real provider**

Proxy intercepts Turn 2 first attempt (HTTP 200 text/plain ŌåÆ failover: unclassified). Real ZTE Qwen3-235B-A22B API handles all other requests.

```
=== Turn 1: echo hello ŌåÆ side effects accumulated ===
[proxy] chat #1 ŌåÆ real API / chat #2 ŌåÆ real API
hello ŌåÉ tool output
[agent] run ... stopReason=stop

=== Turn 2: plaintext error ŌåÆ retry ŌåÆ recovery ===
[proxy] chat #3 ŌåÆ text/plain 200 ŌåÆ failover: unclassified
  ŌåÆ shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn ŌåÆ retry allowed (per-attempt clean)
[proxy] chat #4 ŌåÆ real API (retry)
OK ŌåÉ recovered reply
[agent] run ... stopReason=stop

Turn 2 used 2 model calls despite HTTP 200 ŌĆö transport layer does not retry
HTTP 200. The extra call is runner-level empty-error-retry.
```

**Proof 3 ŌĆö Behavior matrix (5 scenarios)**

```
[1] currentAttempt clean + cumulative dirty (PRIOR TOOLS) ŌåÆ retry YES Ō£ģ
[2] currentAttempt dirty + cumulative dirty (SAME-ATTEMPT TOOLS) ŌåÆ retry NO Ō£ģ
[3] LEGACY (no currentAttempt), cumulative dirty ŌåÆ retry NO Ō£ģ
[4] No metadata at all (5xx before tool subsystem) ŌåÆ retry YES Ō£ģ
[5] Both clean (clean session) ŌåÆ retry YES Ō£ģ
```

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --run
 Test Files  1 passed (1) / Tests  114 passed (114)

node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs (all 7 changed files)
 (passed, exit 0)
```

**Observed result after fix**: The runner produces `[empty-error-retry]` for both `unclassified` and `server_error` provider failures when the attempt is side-effect-free. Live gateway agent recovers from provider error on Turn 2 after Turn 1's tool execution. Same-attempt tool side effects correctly block retry (via replay state delta). Legacy harnesses without `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` stay conservative via cumulative fallback.

**What was not tested**: Live E2E with a real provider returning HTTP 500 + JSON error body (classified `server_error` path). The `server_error` path is verified through the runner harness with mocked failover classification. Gateway proof covers the `unclassified` path end-to-end with real API.

## Regression Test Plan

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts --run` ŌĆö 25 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --run` ŌĆö 114 passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs` on all changed files ŌĆö exit 0

## Root Cause

Three issues:

1. **Cumulative metadata**: In `attempt.ts`, `replayMetadataFromState(observeReplayMetadata(getReplayState(), observedReplayMetadata))` merges per-attempt data with accumulated session-level state. `rawAttempt.replayMetadata` is always cumulative. The fix computes `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` from the replay state delta (snapshot before tool work vs. current state) merged with `observedReplayMetadata` ŌĆö giving a genuine per-attempt signal free of prior-turn history.

2. **Missed classified errors**: `silentErrorRetryReason` excluded `server_error`, the failover reason produced by real provider 5xx JSON error responses. The fix adds `server_error` to the retry gate while preserving `shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn`'s content/tool/side-effect safety checks.

3. **Same-attempt tool tracking gap**: `observedReplayMetadata` was built with `toolMetas: []`, missing replay-unsafe tool updates that `handleToolExecutionEnd` records into `getReplayState()`. The fix captures the replay state delta via `currentAttemptReplayState(initialSnapshot, currentState)` and merges it with `observedReplayMetadata`.

## AI Assistance

- **AI-assisted**: Yes
- **Model used**: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context)
- **Co-Authored-By**: Already in commit message
